title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
summary: Anthropic's $380 billion valuation is attracting investor interest as some OpenAI investors reassess the rationale for OpenAI's recent funding round, which assumes a $1.2 trillion-plus IPO valuation. The comparison highlights shifting investor sentiment in the competitive AI market.
content: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.

zh.title: Anthropic的崛起让一些OpenAI投资者重新考虑
zh.summary: Anthropic的3800亿美元估值正在吸引投资者关注，一些OpenAI投资者正在重新评估OpenAI最近融资的合理性，该融资基于1.2万亿美元以上的IPO估值。这种对比突显了竞争激烈的AI市场中投资者情绪的变化。
